title: Architecture Window View Photo AI
sourceTitle: Architecture Window View Photo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable architecture window view with architecture-framed window view with interior foreground, exterior focal scene, and balanced perspective. View through an airplane window capturing a stunning 4K black-and-white photo of a futuristic, ultra-modern house sitting on top of a snow-capped mou. Nothing surrounds the house except clouds and snow. The shot is taken slightly from above, looking straight through the window, not from the side. airplane-window viewpoint Window Frame: rounded airplane window frame with subtle cabin reflection. Architecture. Subject: ultra-modern house perched on a snowy mountain ridge. Landscape Context: snow-capped peaks, deep valley, thin cloud layer, and distant horizon. Weather Mood: cold clear atmosphere with high-altitude haze. Photo Treatment: 4K black-and-white travel photograph with crisp architecture detail. Contrast Rule: make the house believable in scale and keep the window edge framing obvious. Subject: Make ultra-modern house perched on a snowy mountain ridge the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in snow-capped peaks, deep valley, thin cloud layer, and distant horizon. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use rounded airplane window frame in the foreground, architecture centered beyond it, realistic aerial perspective and scale. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in 4K black-and-white travel photograph with crisp architecture detail. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use black-and-white tonal range with clean snow highlights, deep window shadows, and soft cloud grays. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
